# MVS Solves

> Digital work, done properly. One person — Martin — builds and fixes the digital basics small businesses rely on: fast websites, Google Business Profiles, AI-powered booking, and local SEO. No agency, no handoffs.

MVS Solves is a one-person studio. Every engagement starts with a free 30-minute call, followed by a plain-language plan (what, when, how much) and then the build. Contact: martin@mvssolves.com.

## Services

- [Websites that convert](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Fast, honest websites built to sell — not template soup.
- [Google Business Profile setup](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): The single biggest source of local customers, set up right.
- [AI booking](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Takes bookings and answers FAQs around the clock, in your voice.
- [Local SEO & reviews](https://mvssolves.com/#what-i-do): Map-pack visibility plus a steady stream of genuine 5-star reviews.

## Pages

- [Home](https://mvssolves.com/): Overview of services, how it works, and FAQs.
- [Book a call](https://mvssolves.com/book-a-call): Pick a free 30-minute discovery slot.

## How it works

1. We talk for 30 minutes — you say what's broken, I say straight if I can fix it.
2. You get a real plan in plain language — what, when, how much.
3. I build it — drafts before live, then I hand over the keys or keep watch.

## Contact

- Email: martin@mvssolves.com
- Booking: https://mvssolves.com/book-a-call
